text:
Compare elements from both lists and add the smaller one to the result list, repeating this process until all elements are merged. 
```python
def merge_sorted(a, b):
    result = []
    i = j = 0
    while i < len(a) and j < len(b):
        if a[i] < b[j]:
            result.append(a[i])
            i += 1
        else:
            result.append(b[j])
            j += 1
    result += a[i:]
    result += b[j:]
    return result
```
